parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Required. Fully qualified model class name (must implement DataTableBlueprintInterface)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Optional array. Filter parameters. Cannot be used with saved_view_id.

parameters.name: saved_view_id
parameters.description: Optional integer. Load filter state from a saved view. Cannot be used with filter.

parameters.name: include_data_table_blueprint
parameters.description: Optional boolean. Include blueprint config and searchable fields in response

parameters.name: include_saved_views
parameters.description: Optional boolean. Include saved views for the model in response
